languages.text: "Ты никогда не видел подлинной красоты", {n}— сочувственно отзывается Ирлиэт.{/n} "Утешься — этот мир лишь железная скорлупа амбиций мон-кай. Скверна не отняла у Вселенной ничего ценного, когда охватила его".

traits.locale_text: "Ты никогда не видел подлинной красоты", {n}— сочувственно отзывается Ирлиэт.{/n} "Утешься — этот мир лишь железная скорлупа амбиций мон-кай. Скверна не отняла у Вселенной ничего ценного, когда охватила его".
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."
languages.original_text: "Ты никогда не видел подлинной красоты", {n}— сочувственно отзывается Ирлиэт.{/n} "Утешься — этот мир лишь железная скорлупа амбиций мон-кай. Скверна не отняла у Вселенной ничего ценного, когда охватила его".

traits.locale_text: "You've never seen true beauty", {n}— Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when it succumbed to corruption."
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

traits.locale_text: "You've never seen true beauty", {n}— Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when it succumbed to corruption."

traits.locale_text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

traits.locale_text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: "Du hast noch nie wahre Schönheit gesehen". {n}In Yrliets Worten schwingt echte Sympathie mit.{/n} "Aber sei getröstet — diese Welt ist nur eine eiserne Hülle, ein lebloser Schrott aus eintönigem Ehrgeiz. Das Universum hat nichts verloren, als die Korruption es eroberte."
languages.original_text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."

traits.locale_text: "Du hast noch nie wahre Schönheit gesehen". {n}In Yrliets Worten schwingt echte Sympathie mit.{/n} "Aber sei getröstet — diese Welt ist nur eine eiserne Hülle, ein lebloser Schrott aus eintönigem Ehrgeiz. Das Universum hat nichts verloren, als die Korruption es eroberte."

languages.text: "Vous n'avez jamais vu la vraie beauté. {n}Les mots d'Yrliet résonnent d'une réelle sympathie.{/n} "Mais consolez-vous, ce monde n'est qu'une coquille de fer, un débris sans vie d'une ambition de mon-keigh. L'univers n'a rien perdu lorsque la corruption l'a emporté."
languages.original_text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."

traits.locale_text: "Vous n'avez jamais vu la vraie beauté. {n}Les mots d'Yrliet résonnent d'une réelle sympathie.{/n} "Mais consolez-vous, ce monde n'est qu'une coquille de fer, un débris sans vie d'une ambition de mon-keigh. L'univers n'a rien perdu lorsque la corruption l'a emporté."

languages.text: "Nunca has visto la verdadera belleza". {n}Las palabras de Yrliet resuenan con auténtica simpatía.{/n} "Pero consuélate: este mundo no es más que una cáscara de hierro, un trozo sin vida de ambición mon-keigh. El Universo no perdió nada cuando la corrupción lo reclamó".
languages.original_text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."

traits.locale_text: "Nunca has visto la verdadera belleza". {n}Las palabras de Yrliet resuenan con auténtica simpatía.{/n} "Pero consuélate: este mundo no es más que una cáscara de hierro, un trozo sin vida de ambición mon-keigh. El Universo no perdió nada cuando la corrupción lo reclamó".

languages.text: "Gerçek güzelliği hiç görmediniz." {n}Yrliet'in sözleri gerçek bir sempati ile yankılanıyor.{/n} "Ama teselli bul — bu dünya sadece demir bir kabuk, cansız bir mon-keigh hırsı hurdası. Yozlaşma onu ele geçirdiğinde Evren hiçbir şey kaybetmedi."
languages.original_text: "You have never seen true beauty." {n}Yrliet's words resonate with genuine sympathy.{/n} "But be consoled — this world is merely an iron shell, a lifeless scrap of mon-keigh ambition. The Universe lost nothing when corruption claimed it."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek güzelliği hiç görmediniz." {n}Yrliet'in sözleri gerçek bir sempati ile yankılanıyor.{/n} "Ama teselli bul — bu dünya sadece demir bir kabuk, cansız bir mon-keigh hırsı hurdası. Yozlaşma onu ele geçirdiğinde Evren hiçbir şey kaybetmedi."
